testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Real shop owners using {{brand}} to run their stores every day.

1.quote: I used to track sales in a notebook — end-of-month reconciliation was painful. Now POS and reports are on one screen, saving me 2-3 hours every day.
1.name: Mai

2.quote: Guests scan QR to order themselves, the kitchen gets tickets faster. Fewer mistakes, weekend revenue is noticeably up.
2.name: Hung
2.role: Restaurant owner · Ho Chi Minh City

3.quote: I launched the storefront and got COD orders in the first week. Inventory and online orders live in one place — I never miss an order.
3.name: Linh

features: Counter POS checkout with fast receipt printing
Products, variants, toppings, barcodes, Excel import

pricing.ctaSecondary: Already have an account? Log in

free.q: How long is the free trial?
free.a: You get a full 30-day free trial with every feature unlocked — no credit card required at signup. After the trial, activation costs 99,000 ₫ / month to keep using the platform.

storefront.a: Enable it in shop settings to get a public page by slug. Guests cart and place COD orders — they appear in Orders with the Online label.

qr.q: Does table QR need an app?
qr.a: Guests scan with the phone camera and order in the browser — no app install. For F&B shops with table management enabled.

posOffline.a: The cart stays on device; when offline you'll be notified and can retry when back online. Stable connection is recommended at peak hours.

industries.a: Table QR is for F&B. Retail shops use POS and online storefront fully.

upgrade.q: Is cancellation easy? What happens after expiry?
upgrade.a: Cancel renewal anytime under Subscription — no long-term contracts. After expiry your data is kept; just reactivate to resume selling.
